author: Dr3pi
description: Export a book manuscript written in Obsidian to a clean, professionally-structured EPUB. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Dr3pi
manifest.description: Export a book manuscript to a clean, professionally-structured EPUB.
manifest.name: Manuscript Export

name: Manuscript Export

releases.author: Dr3pi
releases.description: Same pattern as 0.1.2's fix, one line earlier: explicit unknown type annotation on the intermediate variable before the typeof narrowing check.
releases.name: 0.1.3 -- Fix remaining unsafe-assignment warning

releases.author: Dr3pi
releases.description: The 0.1.1 fix cast loadData()'s any-typed result directly to the settings type, which doesn't validate anything at runtime and was still correctly flagged. This replaces it with real per-field runtime type checks.
releases.name: 0.1.2 -- Properly fix unsafe-assignment finding

releases.author: Dr3pi
releases.description: Fixes all findings from Obsidian's automated submission review: removed the word "Obsidian" from the manifest description, and eliminated dynamic script-element creation / eval-style code execution that came from two unnecessary legacy polyfill packages in a dependency. No behavior change -- verified byte-identical EPUB output before and after.
releases.name: 0.1.1 -- Fix submission review findings

releases.author: Dr3pi
releases.description: Free-tier EPUB export. Converts Obsidian manuscript notes (wikilinks, image embeds, callouts, scene breaks, emphasis) into a spec-valid EPUB. See README for usage and current limitations.
releases.name: 0.1.0 -- Initial release
